prompt: A photorealistic, cinematic portrait of a young East Asian woman sitting on a dark chair. She has shoulder-length bob hair with straight bangs colored teal. She is wearing a navy blue tank top and light beige linen shorts. She is leaning slightly forward with her hands resting near her knees, looking directly at the camera with a neutral, calm expression. The scene features dramatic shadows from venetian blinds, casting distinct horizontal stripes of warm, golden light across her face, body, and the plain warm-toned wall behind her. A window with closed blinds is visible on the right side of the frame. High contrast, moody atmosphere, highly detailed.
